rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CATHERINE MARIE BREMER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/15/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Detailed schedules of receipts and gains and losses on sale must be filed to support the statutory fee. [CRC 7.705(b) and 7.550(b)(6).] (2) A petition for final distribution must state the date on which notice was mailed to the FTB. [LRSF 14.35 I.2.] (3) Paragraph 11 of the petition is not elucidating; the summary of account (when the accounting was waived) does not set forth any understandable transactions, and no schedules ere attached. (4) A petition for final distribution must state specifically how the estate is to be distributed by showing the distributee's name and description of the property, including the net amount of cash (as of a date certain) distributable to each beneficiary. [CRC 7.651; LRSF 14.35 I.6.] (5) What happened to the tangible personal property? [CRC 7.550(b).] Please provide a revised proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 9/2/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Item 4 of an I&A should NOT be completed when a probate referee HAS BEEN appointed.) NB: Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ZETTIE BERNETT HIGHTOWER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved Of Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/24/25. (No earlier date available.) (1) No proof of service has been filed. (2) The notice of motion and motion, the declaration, and the proposed order must be served on the client and on all other parties who have appeared in the case. The notice may be by personal service, electronic service, or mail. [CRC 3.1362.] (3) Notice must have attached to it the CURRENT instructions for how to make a remote appearance as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. (4) The next hearing date is set for 2/2/26 (status hearing to track closing the estate). Deadline is 9/10/25 for providing courtesy copies of any responsive papers to the assigned examiner. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DORIS ANN NORDEEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Granted per written order. The bank statement verified the balance shown in the accounting, or $1,816,442.71, not $1,816.422.71, as stated in paragraph 20 of the petition and in the executor's declaration filed on 6/24/25. The "supplement" filed on 6/24/25 actually AMENDED the petition, but, since the corrected amounts were higher, the hearing will not be continued again.
